title: Verify Peek modal end-to-end and add regression test
description: The CSRF / Vite changeOrigin fix landed in CP1 but was never reproduced live because /api/sessions kept timing out during the design pass. Open Agents, click Peek on any active session, confirm the modal renders opaque against the scrim and the POST succeeds (no 403). Add a Playwright regression test in scripts/snap-peek.mjs (already scaffolded) that asserts modal visible + at least one /api/sessions/.../peek 200.

title: Investigate slow /api/sessions and /api/beads endpoints
description: Both endpoints intermittently time out (>10s). Surfaces as 'No sessions running' / 'Nothing on the queue right now' empty states in the dashboard even though the gc supervisor has real data. Likely a slow shell-out to gc CLI in the backend's gc-client.ts. Profile backend/src/routes/sessions.ts and backend/src/routes/beads.ts to find the hot path; consider caching, parallel fetch, or talking to the supervisor's HTTP API directly instead of shelling out.

title: Retire residual 'Charlie' references in code comments and docs
description: After the standalone-codebase cleanup commit, 'Charlie' still appears in: backend/src/gc-client.ts (memory reference 'Charlie's corrected diagnosis'), docs/ARCHITECTURE.md (multiple 'Charlie can identify...' references describing the operator), docs/SECURITY.md ('compose-from field is greyed when viewing-as ≠ Charlie'). Decide which to keep (genuine attribution / commit history references) and which to retire (runtime operator descriptions, replace with 'the operator' or 'stephanie').

title: Mobile and tablet responsive design
description: Per PRODUCT.md the target is MacBook Pro 16-inch primary plus occasional host console, so phone is not in scope. But the Header + Tables collapse fragile below ~960px. Decide if a basic tablet/phone layout is worth adding for emergency-debug-from-couch use, and if so, design the breakpoints (probably: collapse nav to a Menu disclosure under 768px, allow horizontal-scroll on tables, drop max-width to 100vw with side padding).
